creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Here are a few more unique London pubs 🇬🇧👇

It’s not hard to find a pub in London, but there’s a big difference between your bog-standard Wetherspoons and a pub with lots of character 😇  Here are a few other unique pubs in London that should be on your radar:

📍The Grapes: owned by Sir Ian McKellen, and if you look behind the bar, you can see Gandalf’s staff (yes, the actual one from Lord of the Rings)

📍The Pride of Spitalfields: if you’ve ever dreamt of visiting a pub in the 1960s, here’s your chance - a proper old-school boozer in London’s East End.

📍The Dublin Castle: if you’re into bands like Madness and The Specials, you must visit this iconic pub in Camden Town. And if the weather’s nice, head down the road to The Edinboro Castle, where there’s a lovely beer garden.

📍Lamb Tavern in Leadenhall Market: this pub is nothing special, tbh, but its location inside the stunning Leadenhall Market is pretty damn cool. Get a pint and sit “outside” and take it all in.

📍The Toucan: if you like a pint of Guinness and find yourself in Soho, this is the place to go (because you won’t be able to get a seat in The Devonshire these days 😅)

I could keep going: Ye Olde Mitre, Prospect of Whitby, Lord Clyde Southwark, The Dove Hammersmith, The Harp…   What are your favourite pub(s) in London? 🍻

#london #londonpubs #traveltips #londonlife
